title: erodium pimpinellifolium
intro: Erodium pimpinellifolium, also known as red-stemmed geranium or heron's bill, is a perennial herb belonging to the Geraniaceae family. It is a wildflower native to the Mediterranean region, valued for its medicinal properties due to its rich content of flavonoids, tannins, and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems, inflammation, and infections, thanks to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Erodium pimpinellifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
